primary_narrative: EV Indonesia melaju cepat, tapi keberhasilannya ditentukan oleh kesiapan industri dan kebersihan listrik.

core_sections.title: Nusantara Electrified
core_sections.purpose: Hero section with core thesis and headline metrics.

core_sections.title: EV Melaju Cepat
core_sections.purpose: Show BEV annual growth and market acceleration.

core_sections.title: Infrastruktur Mengejar
core_sections.purpose: Show SPKLU geography, province concentration, connector types, and operator mix.

core_sections.title: Seberapa Hijau EV?
core_sections.purpose: Interactive grid-emission slider and EV vs ICE emissions comparison.

core_sections.title: Dari Nikel ke Mobil Listrik
core_sections.purpose: Explain EV industrial value chain, investment, capacity, TKDN, and risks.

core_sections.title: Nickel & Grid Paradox
core_sections.purpose: Show the two central tensions: nickel opportunity versus LFP/smelter risk, and EV climate benefit versus coal-heavy grid.

core_sections.title: Bukan Menolak, Masih Ragu
core_sections.purpose: Summarize public barriers and sentiment sources.

core_sections.title: Tiga Syarat EV Menjadi Transformasi Nasional
core_sections.purpose: Close with actionable synthesis: infrastructure, clean grid, local industry readiness.

visual_priority: EV emissions slider by grid factor
required_caveats: GAIKINDO image-derived figures require final verification.
SPKLU local CSV upstream URL must be cited before final submission.
Investment data must distinguish announced vs operational capacity.
Grid factor is Ember-derived open estimate, not a latest official KLHK/ESDM number.
